message:
🐛 Fix 4 failing tests: agent token state, IDB mirror mock, toggle click (#11069)

- shared.ts: Export _resetAgentTokenState() to reset agentTokenPromise
  and agentTokenFailureEmitted between tests
- shared-coverage.test.ts: Call _resetAgentTokenState() in beforeEach
  so GA4 failure tests don't see stale state from prior tests
- cache-coverage.test.ts: Call vi.resetModules() before vi.doMock()
  (not after via importFresh) so the CacheWorkerRpc mock survives
- useCardFiltering-controls.test.tsx: Use fireEvent.click + act()
  for checkbox toggle to properly trigger React onChange and flush
  state updates across separate render trees

Signed-off-by: ks-ci-bot <ks-ci-bot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: ks-ci-bot <ks-ci-bot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
